entities.description: ch340t is a hardware chip used to convert uart2 bus to a type c interface for system debugging
uart2 is a bus interface that is converted to a type c interface for system debugging
type c is a product interface standard used for connecting devices

relations.description: ch340t converts uart2 bus to a type c interface for system debugging
ch340t is used to convert uart2 to a type c interface
uart2 is used as the system debugging serial port for communication and debugging
ch340t enables the use of uart2 as a system debugging serial port through type c interface
